'''Gruvia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gruvian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], whom exported [[Gruvian Tovash]]. The planet was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Dead End Drop|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}} {{Mo}}
